response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (~15 years) but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no recent C++ work — only a brief stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014–Jun 2015) writing C/C++ components, which is over a decade old and well short of the 5–10 years required. No Windows-platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience (only MongoDB and generic SQL listed), and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure. Background is primarily web, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure with exposure to low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Demonstrated engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months, ended 2015) — far below the 5–10 years required
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
